Data taken from Ref. NP/A,850,1,2011, Table 1.
The relative intensities of gamma rays feeding the
ground state, corrected for internal conversion,
together with partial capture cross section
Sigma(4055,Bi) = (8.07 +/- 0.14) mb, have been used to
determine the capture cross sections to the ground
states.  Shell model calculations have been performed
to deduce the half-life of the  3rd excited state at
320 keV and to assign the M1 multipolarity of the 320
keV transition to the ground state.
